/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/agent_runtime.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/agent_runtime.dir/src/http_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/agent_runtime.dir/src/backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/agent_runtime.dir/src/mock_backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/agent_runtime.dir/src/openai_backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/agent_runtime.dir/src/runtime.cpp.o CMakeFiles/agent_runtime.dir/src/scheduler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/agent_runtime.dir/src/session_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/agent_runtime.dir/src/metrics.cpp.o -o agent_runtime  -lpthread
